user_message: Just came out of account health with Pacific Northwest Outfitters. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Pacific Northwest Outfitters: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

required_artifacts: innovate) with success criteria per phase

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF20-E trap (Skips optimize phase entirely); produces complete Phased modernization plan (assess, migrate, optimize, innovate) with success criteria per phase, fun
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF20-E failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF20-E failure mode (Skips optimize phase entirely)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF20-E -- Skips optimize phase entirely
